← The Foundations

The Foundations · Build to last

Trademarks

Learn what a trademark actually protects, search properly before you fall in love with a name, and leave knowing whether filing is worth it for you.

90 minutes · live, small group

What we'll cover

  • Trademarks vs. LLC names vs. domains — what each one actually protects
  • How to search properly before you commit to a name
  • When a DIY federal filing makes sense — and when to hire an attorney
  • Keeping your mark alive once you have it

What you'll walk out with

A search-and-file roadmap for your business name.

The Foundations open this fall (2026). Be first to hear — and grab a free hour in the meantime — at Coffee with Quinta.

Join the waitlist Start free: Coffee with Quinta

Educational only — not legal advice. Confirm your filing with a trademark attorney.

Questions, answered

About this class

1

Who is Trademarks for?

Women founders whose business is up and running and who want to strengthen this part of it. It's part of The Foundations, the plain-language business fundamentals track.

2

Do I need any experience?

None — every Quinta & Co. class is plain language and hands-on.

3

What will I walk out with?

A search-and-file roadmap for your business name. Every Quinta & Co. class ends with something real you keep.

4

When can I take this class?

Enrollment opens Fall 2026. Join the waitlist at quintaand.co/waitlist to hear first — and the free monthly Coffee with Quinta is open in the meantime.

Quinta & Co.

Quinta & Co. classes are educational and are not legal, tax, financial, or HR/employment advice. For decisions about your specific situation, please consult a qualified professional.
